snippets.title: FastAPI 文件上传
snippets.description: 带进度条的异步文件上传接口，支持大文件分片
snippets.code:
from fastapi import FastAPI, UploadFile, File
from fastapi.responses import StreamingResponse
import asyncio

app = FastAPI()

@app.post("/upload")
async def upload_file(file: UploadFile = File(...)):
    chunk_size = 1024 * 1024  # 1MB chunks
    uploaded = 0
    total = file.size
    
    async for chunk in iter(lambda: file.file.read(chunk_size), b""):
        uploaded += len(chunk)
        progress = round(uploaded / total * 100, 1)
        print(f"Progress: {progress}%")
        await asyncio.sleep(0.01)  # Simulate processing
    
    return {"filename": file.filename, "size": total}

snippets.title: Claude Code CLI 集成
snippets.description: 通过命令行调用 Claude Code，自动完成任务规划和代码生成
snippets.code:
# Install claude code CLI
npm install -g @anthropic/claude-code

# Run autonomous coding session
claude --task "Refactor the user authentication module" \
  --model claude-opus-4-5 \
  --max-tokens 8000 \
  --output-format json

snippets.title: OKX OI 四象限分析
snippets.description: 实时监控持仓总量与价格方向共振，捕捉趋势拐点

snippets.title: Docker 健康检查
snippets.code:
FROM node:20-alpine

HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s \
  CMD wget --no-verbose --tries=1 --spider http://localhost:3000/health \
  || exit 1

EXPOSE 3000
CMD ["node", "server.js"]
